author: Josh (based on Vexed's ButtonPoll)
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs paired with guild IDs and how they voted if a user participated in a poll. This data is removed once a poll finishes.
install_msg: Thanks for installing! Load the cog and get started with the `buttonpoll` command or the `/poll` slash command.
name: ButtonPoll
short: Create polls powered by buttons with text-based results.
